Next,  we  performed 
the  Rh-PLGA-NPs@NH4  uptake
studies  and  compare  the  results  with  the  other  devel-
oped particles. The study was conducted in THP-1 cells
when  Rh-PLGA-NPs@NH4  along  with  other  particles

the  uptake  pattern  of  Rh-PLGA-NPs@NH4.  The  higher
